title: Bikanervala Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Bikanervala Advisory Limited is Hiring: Floor Manager (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Floor Manager with drive and ambition, Bikanervala Advisory Limited in Ahmedabad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Bikanervala Advisory Limited:
Bikanervala Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Manage shrinkage and reduce stock discrepancies
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Team Leadership
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Planogram

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Learning & development budget
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ahmedabad, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Bikanervala Advisory Limited!
